title: NoJS Directive Schema
description: Machine-readable schema of all NoJS framework directives for AI generation

plugin.description: Plugin package name if not core

isPattern.description: True if this is a pattern directive (e.g. bind-*, on:*)

state.name: state
state.description: Declares reactive state on the element. The value is evaluated as a JavaScript object literal.

optional.name: persist-fields
optional.description: Comma-separated list of state fields to persist selectively

examples: <section state="{ items: [], loading: false }" persist persist-key="my-app">

store.name: store
store.description: Declares a named global store accessible via $store.name from any element in the page.

required.name: value
required.description: Initial store data as JS object literal

computed.name: computed
computed.description: Declares a computed property that auto-updates when dependencies change.

watch.name: watch
watch.description: Watches an expression for changes and runs a handler. Handler receives $old and $new variables.

get.name: get
get.description: Performs an HTTP GET request and makes response data available via the 'as' companion.

optional.name: empty
optional.description: Template ID shown when response is empty

optional.name: into
optional.description: Store name to put response into

optional.name: skeleton
optional.description: ID of a DOM element to hide while loading and restore on response

examples: <div get="/api/search" as="results" params="{ q: query }" debounce="300">

post.name: post
post.description: Performs an HTTP POST request. Same companions as 'get'.

optional.name: empty
optional.description: Template ID shown when response is empty

optional.name: into
optional.description: Store name to put response into

optional.name: skeleton
optional.description: ID of a DOM element to hide while loading and restore on response

examples: <form post="/api/login" body="{ username, password }" then="$store.auth.token = result.token">

put.name: put
put.description: Performs an HTTP PUT request. Same companions as 'get'.

optional.name: empty
optional.description: Template ID shown when response is empty

optional.name: into
optional.description: Store name to put response into

patch.name: patch
patch.description: Performs an HTTP PATCH request. Same companions as 'get'.

optional.name: into
optional.description: Store name to put response into

delete.name: delete
delete.description: Performs an HTTP DELETE request. Same companions as 'get'.
examples: <button delete="/api/users/1" confirm="Delete this user?" then="users = users.filter(u => u.id !== 1)">

bind.name: bind
bind.description: Binds element's text content to a JS expression. Updates reactively when dependencies change.

bind-html.name: bind-html
bind-html.description: Binds element's innerHTML to a JS expression. Use for rendering trusted HTML content.

model.name: model
model.description: Two-way data binding for form elements. Updates the variable on user input and reflects variable changes back to the element.

if.name: if
if.description: Conditionally renders the element. Removes from DOM when expression is false. Can be followed by else-if and else siblings.

optional.name: then
optional.description: Template ID to render when true

optional.name: else
optional.description: Template ID to render when false

else-if.name: else-if
else-if.description: Conditional branch after 'if'. Must follow a sibling with 'if' or 'else-if'.

optional.name: then
optional.description: Template ID to render when true

else.name: else
else.description: Fallback branch after 'if' or 'else-if'. Must follow a sibling with 'if' or 'else-if'. Takes no value.

show.name: show
show.description: Toggles element visibility via CSS display. Element stays in DOM unlike 'if'.

hide.name: hide
hide.description: Opposite of 'show'. Hides element via CSS display:none when expression is true.

switch.name: switch
switch.description: Switch statement. Children use 'case' and 'default' attributes to match values.
examples:
Admin panel

Dashboard

Guest view

case.name: case
case.description: Switch case. Used inside a 'switch' container. Value is matched against the switch expression.

default.name: default
default.description: Default case in a 'switch' block. Renders when no 'case' matches.

each.name: each
each.description: Loops over an iterable collection using 'item in list' syntax. Provides loop context variables.

optional.name: key
optional.description: Unique key expression for DOM optimization

optional.name: animate-stagger
optional.description: Stagger delay between items in ms

foreach.name: foreach
foreach.description: Alternative loop with more options: filter, sort, limit, offset. Uses 'foreach' for item variable and 'from' for the list.

optional.name: animate-stagger
optional.description: Stagger delay between items in ms

trigger.name: trigger
trigger.description: Dispatches a custom event that can be listened to by ancestor elements via on:eventName.

ref.name: ref
ref.description: Declares a reference to this element, accessible via $refs.name in expressions.

use.name: use
use.description: Inserts a <template> by ID, optionally passing slot parameters via var-* companions.

call.name: call
call.description: HTTP call triggered by user action (click). Unlike get/post, it does not auto-fetch on mount.

validate.name: validate
validate.description: Form validation with pristine-aware errors. On a form, creates $form context. On a field, applies validator rules (pipe-separated).

optional.name: error
optional.description: Error message or template ID (prefix with #)

optional.name: error-class
optional.description: CSS class(es) applied to invalid fields

optional.name: validate-on
optional.description: Validation trigger events (space-separated: input, blur, focusout, submit)

optional.name: validate-if
optional.description: Conditional expression; field is only validated when truthy

optional.name: as
optional.description: Expose per-field validation state as a context variable

examples:
<form validate="" error-class="is-invalid" validate-on="input blur">
  <input name="email" validate="required|email" error-required="Email is required" />
</form>

error-boundary.name: error-boundary
error-boundary.description: Wraps content with error handling. Shows fallback template on error. Prevents errors from propagating.

t.name: t
t.description: i18n translation. Value is the translation key. Interpolation params via t-* attributes.

optional.name: t-html
optional.description: Render translation as sanitized HTML instead of plain text

i18n-ns.name: i18n-ns
i18n-ns.description: Sets i18n namespace for child elements. Translation keys are prefixed with this namespace. Without a value on route-view, auto-detects from template name.

drag.name: drag
drag.description: Makes element draggable. Value is the expression for the dragged item data.

optional.name: drag-type
optional.description: Type identifier for the dragged item

optional.name: drag-image
optional.description: CSS selector for custom drag image

drop.name: drop
drop.description: Makes element a drop target. Value is a statement executed on drop. Handler receives $drag, $dragType, $dropIndex, etc.

drag-list.name: drag-list
drag-list.description: Sortable list with drag and drop support. Value is the list path expression.

optional.name: drop-empty-class
optional.description: CSS class when list is empty

drag-multiple.name: drag-multiple
drag-multiple.description: Enables multi-select drag on 'drag' elements. Requires drag-group companion.

base.name: base
base.description: Sets the base URL for all descendant fetch directives (get, post, put, patch, delete, call).

route.name: route
route.description: Turns an <a> into a route link or defines a route on a <template>. Supports path params (:id), wildcards (*), and route head management.

optional.name: route-active
optional.description: CSS class added when route is active (default: 'active')

optional.name: route-active-exact
optional.description: CSS class added only on exact path match

optional.name: page-jsonld
optional.description: Creates/updates JSON-LD structured data on each navigation

route-view.name: route-view
route-view.description: Route rendering outlet. Displays the template matching the current route. Supports file-based routing via 'src'.

optional.name: transition
optional.description: CSS transition class prefix for route changes

guard.name: guard
guard.description: Route guard that prevents navigation when the expression is falsy. Used on route templates.

required.name: redirect
required.description: Path to redirect to when guard fails

include.name: include
include.description: Synchronously clones an inline template into the current position. Used on <template> elements.

page-title.name: page-title
page-title.description: Updates document.title reactively. Place on a <div hidden> for non-routing pages. Value is a JS expression.

page-description.name: page-description
page-description.description: Creates or updates <meta name="description"> in <head>. Reactive.
examples: <div hidden page-description="'Welcome to our online store'">

page-canonical.name: page-canonical
page-canonical.description: Creates or updates <link rel="canonical" href="..."> in <head>. Reactive.

page-jsonld.name: page-jsonld
page-jsonld.description: Creates or updates JSON-LD structured data in <head>. Template is written in element body with {expression} placeholders.

modal.name: modal
modal.description: Declares a modal dialog using the native Popover API with focus trapping, stacking z-index, and ARIA attributes.

optional.name: modal-class
optional.description: Additional CSS class(es) applied while the modal is open

optional.name: modal-escape
optional.description: Set to 'false' to disable Escape key and backdrop click closing

optional.name: modal-backdrop
optional.description: Set to 'false' to remove the dark backdrop overlay

modal-open.name: modal-open
modal-open.description: Opens a modal dialog by ID on click. Without a value, finds the nearest modal in the same scope.

modal-close.name: modal-close
modal-close.description: Closes a modal dialog. Without a value, closes the closest ancestor modal. With a value, closes the modal with that ID.

dropdown.name: dropdown
dropdown.description: Wraps a toggle, menu, and items into a dropdown unit. Uses native Popover API for light-dismiss.

optional.name: dropdown-position
optional.description: Primary axis for menu placement (top, bottom, left, right)

dropdown-toggle.name: dropdown-toggle
dropdown-toggle.description: The element that opens/closes the dropdown menu on click. Must be inside a [dropdown] container.

dropdown-menu.name: dropdown-menu
dropdown-menu.description: The menu panel that appears when the toggle is activated. Uses popover='auto' for native light-dismiss.

dropdown-item.name: dropdown-item
dropdown-item.description: An actionable item inside the dropdown menu. Supports keyboard navigation and disabled state.

tooltip.name: tooltip
tooltip.description: Shows a tooltip on hover/focus with viewport-aware positioning.

optional.name: tooltip-disabled
optional.description: When truthy, prevents tooltip from showing

popover.name: popover
popover.description: Declares popover content linked to a trigger. Uses viewport-aware positioning with flip logic.

popover-trigger.name: popover-trigger
popover-trigger.description: Opens the linked popover on click. Value is the popover ID.

popover-dismiss.name: popover-dismiss
popover-dismiss.description: Closes the closest ancestor popover on click. Place inside a [popover] element.

toast-container.name: toast-container
toast-container.description: Defines where toast notifications appear on screen. Values: top-right, top-left, bottom-right, bottom-left, top-center, bottom-center.

toast.name: toast
toast.description: Watches an expression and shows a toast notification when the value changes to truthy. The expression's string value becomes the toast message.

optional.name: toast-duration
optional.description: Auto-dismiss delay in ms (default: 3000, 0 for permanent)

tabs.name: tabs
tabs.description: Tab container that coordinates 'tab' buttons and 'panel' content areas.

optional.name: tab-position
optional.description: Placement of the tab list (top, bottom, left, right)

examples:
Panel 1
Panel 2

tab.name: tab
tab.description: Marks an element as a tab trigger inside a [tabs] container. Automatically receives role='tab'.

optional.name: tab-disabled
optional.description: When truthy, the tab cannot be activated

panel.name: panel
panel.description: Marks an element as a tab panel inside a [tabs] container. Shown/hidden based on active tab.

tree.name: tree
tree.description: Marks an element as a tree root with keyboard navigation, ARIA tree roles, and expand/collapse behavior.

optional.name: tree-icon
optional.description: Set to 'false' to hide expand/collapse triangle icons

branch.name: branch
branch.description: Marks an element as an expandable tree item. Use branch='expanded' to start open.

subtree.name: subtree
subtree.description: Marks an element as a collapsible subtree group inside a [branch]. Automatically receives role='group'.

stepper.name: stepper
stepper.description: Multi-step container with progress indicator, validation, and keyboard navigation. Exposes $stepper context API.
examples:
Step 1 content
Step 2 content

step.name: step
step.description: Marks an element as a step panel inside a [stepper] container. In linear mode, validates required inputs before advancing.

optional.name: step-label
optional.description: Custom label shown in the progress indicator

optional.name: step-validate
optional.description: Expression that must be truthy for the step to pass validation

skeleton.name: skeleton
skeleton.description: Displays a shimmer animation while a reactive expression is truthy. When falsy, reveals the real content.

optional.name: skeleton-type
optional.description: Shape of the placeholder (text, circle, rect)

optional.name: skeleton-lines
optional.description: Number of simulated text lines to generate

optional.name: skeleton-size
optional.description: Explicit dimension for circle or rect types

split.name: split
split.description: Resizable split container. Children use 'pane' to define resizable panels separated by draggable gutters.

optional.name: split-persist
optional.description: localStorage key for saving/restoring pane sizes

examples:
Sidebar
Main content

pane.name: pane
pane.description: Defines a pane inside a [split] container. Value is initial size (CSS value). Omit for flexible fill.

optional.name: pane-max
optional.description: Maximum pane size in pixels (default: Infinity)

optional.name: pane-collapsible
optional.description: Enable collapse/expand via double-click on adjacent gutter

sortable.name: sortable
sortable.description: Enables sort coordination on a <table>. Child <th> elements use 'sort' to define sortable columns.

sort.name: sort
sort.description: Marks a <th> as a sortable column inside a 'sortable' table. Click cycles through asc, desc, and unsorted.

fixed-header.name: fixed-header
fixed-header.description: Makes a <thead> sticky at the top of its scroll container.

fixed-col.name: fixed-col
fixed-col.description: Pins a <th> or <td> to the left edge during horizontal scrolling.

bind-*.name: bind-*
bind-*.description: Pattern directive: dynamically binds any HTML attribute to a JS expression. Use as bind-{attribute}. Supports boolean attributes.

class-*.name: class-*
class-*.description: Pattern directive: conditionally applies CSS class(es). Use as class-{name}. Sub-behaviors: class-map (object), class-list (array).

style-*.name: style-*
style-*.description: Pattern directive: dynamically sets a CSS style property. Attribute name is kebab-case. Sub-behavior: style-map (object).

on:*.name: on:*
on:*.description: Pattern directive: listens for DOM events and executes JS statement(s). Use as on:{event}.{modifiers}. Supports lifecycle events: mounted, init, updated, unmounted, error.
